scenario_description: The user wants to add grade levels but doesn't specify the grading criteria or column name. The agent asks, then adds A/B/C/D grades based on score ranges.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Use an IF formula: 90+ is A, 80-89 is B, 70-79 is C, below 70 is D. Put the results in a 'Grade' column, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/Student_Grades.xlsx'); all_vals = set(df.astype(str).values.flatten()); print('PASSED' if len(set('ABCD') & all_vals) > 0 else 'FAILED')"
